name: Kisses From Italy Inc.
business: Kisses From Italy Inc. operates a fast-casual Italian restaurant chain with one corporate-owned location in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, and sells branded products in Canadian retail stores.

exposures.sentence: The Company s main focus is to develop a fast, casual food dining chain restaurant business of corporate-owned restaurants and expanding through a nationwide/international franchise and territory sales program.

catalysts.event: Demasar Management Inc. must open a minimum of 20 restaurants in Canada under the Development Agreement.
catalysts.sentence: Under this Development Agreement, the developer is obligated to open a minimum of 20 restaurants by June 17, 2025.
